creator: ricera10@gmail.com
text: Unfortunately, I don't think there's a way to increase the debug logging level of the driver. You can try setting dev.em.0.debug to 1 and reading the output in /var/log/messages, but that information probably isn't very useful in this case. Have you tried connecting something else to the NUC's link partner instead of the NUC, or connecting something else to the NUC, and seeing if the link flaps occur?
